WEB-012: Screen completion pass - all 11 dashboard screens fully wired. Home=command center, Chat=streaming+commands, Tasks=parsed lanes, Projects=real cards, Files=browser+reader, Memory=search+activity, Approvals=grant explainers, Traces=timeline, Workflows=runs+arch, Agents=roster+tools+routing, Settings=views+runtime+AI+env.

Dashboard screen completion: every screen has real purpose, displays runtime data, has thoughtful empty states, sensible filters/actions, and feels connected to the product. 0/11 placeholder screens remaining.

WEB-013: Runtime semantics pass. Removed: synthetic task parser, demo workflow creator, approve-test chip, prompt() dialog, chat-relay for file reads and memory search, hardcoded agent details. Added: /api/tools/run for direct tool execution, /api/projects for filesystem-backed project scanning. All dashboard screens now source data from canonical runtime state.

EXE-006..EXE-012: Execution substrate pass. Added ToolSpec.environment field, execution substrate gateway status, Execution tab in Settings, substrate-aware Workflows architecture, tightened sandbox config reporting, substrate-aware trace types. Shared types: ExecutionSubstrateStatus, BrowserSubstrateStatus, SandboxSubstrateStatus, ComputerSubstrateStatus.
Browser QA follow-up
Browser QA verification

WEB-014: Full browser QA and polish pass. Live-tested all 11 dashboard screens plus chat/task/project/files/settings flows. Fixed chat history persistence, natural-language create project/create task commands, project scaffolding via chat, and Files quick-read presets/labels. Verified live browser success for project creation, task creation, settings round-trip, and file quick reads.

WEB-015: Product quality elevation pass. Tightened Home into a clearer command center, reframed nav and page hierarchy around local-first agent OS concepts, improved Chat empty-state prompts, clarified Agents/Workflows/Traces/Settings copy, reduced overly technical wording, and aligned more of the dashboard with PRD concepts like views as overlays, durable execution, smart approvals, and filesystem-governed workspace truth.

WEB-016: Session-first IA pass. Root route now renders a shared Session workbench, chat is the primary surface, the right rail shows live session context (task/project/files/approvals/memory/traces/workflows), nav emphasizes Session plus active view/recent projects, and non-session pages now read as expanded views of the current agent session.

WEB-017: Master verification + completion pass. Fixed session semantics by sending real chatId/history from the dashboard and routing per-session in the gateway, corrected approval allow-session behavior to use session grants, upgraded Tasks to read canonical project-context/tasks.md, added fs.list-backed browsing to Files, made Memory flush real session checkpoints and support promote actions, returned real tool execution results from AI chat, fixed worker workflow steps to execute via /api/tools/run, switched Playwright to the honest default browser provider, and updated README/.env/docs to match verified behavior.
